description.en: Master the unittest module — TestCase classes, assertion methods, setUp/tearDown, and running test suites from the command line.
description.ta: unittest module-ஐ கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள் — TestCase classes, assertion methods, setUp/tearDown, மற்றும் command line-ல் இருந்து test suites இயக்குவது.

story_variants.en:
## Vaathiyaar's Inspection Checklist

Vaathiyaar pulls out a clipboard. "In a factory, every product goes through an inspection line. Each inspector checks one thing — weight, colour, size. In Python, `unittest` is your inspection line. Each `TestCase` is an inspector."

### The unittest Module
- Part of Python's standard library — no install needed
- Based on Java's JUnit framework
- Uses classes that inherit from `unittest.TestCase`
- Rich set of assertion methods beyond plain `assert`

### Key Assertion Methods

| Method | Checks |
|--------|--------|
| `assertEqual(a, b)` | a == b |
| `assertNotEqual(a, b)` | a != b |
| `assertTrue(x)` | bool(x) is True |
| `assertFalse(x)` | bool(x) is False |
| `assertRaises(Exc)` | Exception is raised |
| `assertIn(a, b)` | a in b |

### setUp and tearDown
- `setUp()` runs BEFORE each test method
- `tearDown()` runs AFTER each test method
- Perfect for creating/cleaning test data

> **Key Concept:** unittest gives you structured, repeatable inspections for your code. Each test method is independent — setUp ensures a fresh start every time.

explanation.en: Import the built-in unittest module — no pip install needed
Now define the code we want to test
A simple class representing a bank account with balance
Initialize account with owner name and optional starting balance
Store the owner name as an instance attribute
Method to add money to the account
Guard clause: reject zero or negative deposits
Raise an error for invalid deposit amounts
Add the amount to the current balance
Now let's write the test class
Test class inherits from unittest.TestCase — this is required
setUp runs before EACH test — creates a fresh account every time
Create a test account with 100 balance for each test
Test method names MUST start with 'test_' to be discovered

instruction.en: Write a `TestBankAccount` class with setUp creating an account with balance 100. Write tests for: initial balance, deposit of 50 making balance 150, and assertRaises for negative deposit.
instruction.ta: 100 balance-உடன் setUp உருவாக்கும் `TestBankAccount` class எழுதுங்கள். ஆரம்ப balance, 50 deposit செய்து balance 150 ஆவது, எதிர்மறை deposit-க்கு assertRaises ஆகியவற்றிற்கு சோதனைகள் எழுதுங்கள்.

q.en: What must test classes inherit from when using unittest?
q.ta: unittest பயன்படுத்தும்போது test classes எதிலிருந்து inherit செய்ய வேண்டும்?

q.en: Which assertion checks that an exception is raised?
q.ta: எந்த assertion ஒரு exception எழுப்பப்படுகிறதா என்று சரிபார்க்கும்?
